prompt: Minimalist app icon 1024x1024. Pure black background. A single white symbol centered: an abstract ensō (zen circle) that is intentionally incomplete — the gap in the circle suggests both a pause and an invitation to move. The brushstroke is organic, hand-drawn feeling, not perfect. One continuous stroke. White on black. Nothing else. No text. No letters. Extreme minimalism. The incomplete circle represents the cypher — dancers standing in a circle with space for someone to enter and express.
